title: classify PRs into stack-evolution events
description:
## Summary
- Adds `bachelorprojekt.software_events` table, `v_software_stack` and `v_software_history` views tracking which services were added/removed/changed per PR
- LLM classifier module (`software-history-classifier.ts`) + CLI script (`scripts/software-history-classify.mts`) with `--dry-run`, `--retry-failed`, `--limit=N` flags; `task software-history:classify` + `task software-history:psql`
- Admin UI at `/admin/software-history`: stack cards grouped by area, filterable history table, inline edit modal; backed by `/api/admin/software-history` GET + PATCH routes

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all (test 12 is pre-existing `:latest` warning on docs image, unrelated to this feature)
- [x] Schema applied to both prod clusters (mentolder + korczewski) — fixture test passed on korczewski
- [x] Dry-run smoke: DB connectivity confirmed on mentolder (`--dry-run` flag)
- [x] BATS unit tests for classifier CLI with mocked Anthropic server

## Post-merge ops (not blocking)
- Full backfill: `task software-history:classify` against mentolder (~730 PRs, 2–4 h with GPU)
- Copy events to korczewski via `pg_dump | psql` pipe

Closes T000364

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
